structure: subspecialty -> anatomy -> subanatomy_group -> procedure -> variants -> systems
limitations: This is a normalized seed ontology built from the uploaded repo export plus conversation-defined canonical trees.
It is not a verified complete global implant, tray, or SKU catalogue.
Systems are included where present in the uploaded repo export; implants/components/trays/SKUs are left empty unless directly present.
